g.text: Welcome! This wizard will configure your SmolClaw agent.
Press Ctrl+C at any time — partial progress will be saved.
How to find your Telegram user ID:
2. It will reply with your numeric user ID
MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers give your agent access to
external tools: filesystems, databases, GitHub, and more.
If you don't need external tools yet, just skip this step.
at it for more powerful, privacy-friendly search.
Use local SearXNG for web search? (n):
Use local SearXNG for web search? (n): n
Your Telegram bot will be ready to receive messages.
